scripts.d1:migrations:list:local: npm run d1:migrations:prepare && wrangler d1 migrations list APP_DB --local
scripts.d1:migrations:apply:local: npm run d1:migrations:prepare && wrangler d1 migrations apply APP_DB --local
scripts.d1:migrations:list:staging: npm run d1:migrations:prepare && wrangler d1 migrations list APP_DB --remote
scripts.d1:migrations:apply:staging: npm run d1:migrations:prepare && wrangler d1 migrations apply APP_DB --remote
